case_title: DANIELLE DI SALVO VS. CHRIS BREINING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BREINING, CHRIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2023 BY MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF DANIELLE DI SALVO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS BREINING IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN AND D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM.
